title: ErelisVanilla
description: Datapack featuring QoL changes while keeping all of them as Vanillaish as possible
body:
A datapack featuring many Vanillaish QoL features/changes for your survival world. The pack is balanced around multiplayer and singleplayer.
### Features - /trigger sit to sit - craftable light_blocks - craftable chests from logs - craftable string from wool - turn item_frames invisable by holding a glass_pain _(1-Block radius)_ - Hand an Nether Star to a Master Cleric Villager to unlock unique trades - Check out the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/datapack/erelisvanilla/gallery)
About the Villager I made the experience that for some/many people the game is "over" after killing the Ender Dragon though there is content like Shulker Boxes/Elytra that comes after the Ender Dragon _I´m still thinking of a balanced vanillaish feature to obtain an elytra_ so far you can obtain shulker shells from this cleric
Trades Preview NOTE: You can sell any type of potion to the Villager the one displayed in the trade menu is just a "placeholder"\ ![Unique Cleric Trades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1987c7d30420be0189700576c38897fbf9895b07.png)
